body:
## Summary
- Add `--focus-readiness-adapter-rules` as a short-circuit content validator path.
- Mirror six readiness adapter runtime cases into validator summary counters.
- Add learning and routing tests for malformed study/mock counters and focused validator discovery.

## Validation
- `node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-readiness-adapter-rules`
- `node --test tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js scripts/learning.test.js --test-name-pattern "readiness adapter|focus-readiness|finite|counter|mock totals|string counts"`
- `npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
title: [codex] Add readiness adapter focused validator gate
